mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where we make your unrealistic financial dreams a reality! Get ready to be pampered like never before.

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: I was at the fanciest restaurant in town, enjoying a lavish meal with a group of friends. When the bill arrived, I noticed a mistake-the dessert I didn't even order was added to our total. I immediately called over the waiter and, with a look of sheer indignation, I declared, "How dare you try to charge me for something I didn't order! Do you know who I am? I demand to speak to the manager!"As the manager hurried over, I made sure to let everyone within earshot know about this grave injustice. I ranted about the poor service and the audacity of trying to overcharge a valued customer like myself. The manager, clearly flustered, apologized profusely and promptly removed the charge from the bill.Feeling satisfied with my display of entitlement, I graciously accepted the revised bill and, with a smug smile, declared to my friends, "See, this is why it pays to know your worth and demand the best treatment. Never settle for anything less!" And with that, I left the restaurant, head held high, knowing I had once again asserted my dominance in the world of entitlement.
